Index.title: ATUM — The Root of All Words
Index.subtitle: Every Word Has a Root
Index.description: Discover the electromagnetic root systems that structure all human languages. Learn to decode the patterns of speech and sound.
Index.heroExplanation: Language is not arbitrary. Just as Arabic utilizes root letters to derive thousands of words through defined pattern weights (أوزان), all world languages branch from three fundamental electromagnetic roots: ATUM (unity and inertia), BULL (radiation and expansion), and TOR (rotation and cycle).
Index.atumDesc: Represents inertia, stability, containment, and return. It is the static, inward-looking force.
Index.bullDesc: Represents radiation, light, movement, expansion, and flowing energy. It is the active, outward-moving force.
Index.torDesc: Represents rotation, cycles, towers, boundaries, and geometric structure. It is the vortex, combining forces into dynamic spin.
